response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocals are present in this waiting room track; it is entirely instrumental BGM. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON correctly identified the absence of vocal music. Manual visual tracking was used to translate and subtitle prominent on-screen informational slides. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed exclusively to the on-screen duration of official concert notices and transition slides (Visual Event Rule).
